creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Look of the date of the files, rename to _filename. I it works after this, remove all other.
I think something is going wrong, with the move from libevent2 to libevent.
Another way is
rm -rf * in the port
and
portsnap extract devel/libevent
(I hope it will not result in the same files ..).
